subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and made them clear proofs for those who have turned unto His Countenance and declared: "We believe in Thee, O..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات و جعلها بینات للذین اقبلوا الی الوجه و قالوا آمنا بک یا
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
